untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of bid/ask microstructure (consecutive alternating bid-to-ask and ask-to-bid jumps) and transitory spread component elevation. These microstructure features require tick-level order book data and cannot be expressed using only OHLCV candle-based indicators. The 'distance_from_midpoint_in_spreads' parameter also requires real-time spread data unavailable in standard backtest engines.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price_pos_20 (position within 20-bar range) as a proxy for mean reversion tendency and vol_ratio_20 to approximate low-liquidity conditions. However, the core signal logic (alternating bid/ask jumps) is fundamentally microstructure-based and cannot be reliably translated to OHLCV indicators. Recommend using a tick-data compatible backtest engine or adding bid/ask level indicators.
